introduction.name: Sumet Buarod
introduction.title: Software Engineer — Distributed Systems & Cloud-Native Architecture
introduction.bio: Software Engineer specializing in high-performance distributed systems and cloud-native architecture. Expert in building scalable backends with C#, .NET Core, Python, and Golang, and modern frontend ecosystems (React/Next.js). Proficient in visualizing complex logic through Swimlane Diagrams to bridge the gap between business requirements and technical implementation. Strong advocate for Feature-driven development (FDD) and Agile methodologies, with deep hands-on experience in AWS Cloud Infrastructure and Containerization.

experience.description: Architectural design & stakeholder alignment using Swimlane diagrams and flowcharting. Engineered a comprehensive insurance platform with complex business logic and real-time third-party API integrations. Developed a high-concurrency Workflow Engine for financial transaction lifecycle management ensuring atomic operations across distributed services. Built full-stack Policy Management System with real-time Monitoring Dashboard. Designed Granular Access Control (Whitelist) system and internal HR enterprise solutions. Cross-platform mobile development with Kotlin.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Engineering
education.description: GPA: 3.60. Studied computer engineering with focus on software systems, distributed computing, algorithms, and system design. Military Status: Exempted.

skills.name: AWS (S3, ECS, Lambda, API Gateway, CloudWatch)
